      HintName: Priority.g.cs,

// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
using System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis;

namespace Company.Product.Domain.Enumerations
{
    partial class Priority
    {
        private static readonly Dictionary<int, Priority> _byValue = new Dictionary<int, Priority>()
        {
            [1] = Low,
            [2] = Medium,
            [3] = High,
        };

        private static readonly Dictionary<string, Priority> _byName = new Dictionary<string, Priority>()
        {
            ["Low"] = Low,
            ["Medium"] = Medium,
            ["High"] = High,
        };

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets all values of Priority ordered by value.
        /// </summary>
        public static IReadOnlyCollection<Priority> GetAll() => _byValue.Values;

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets the Priority instance from its value.
        /// </summary>
        public static Priority FromValue(int value)
        {
            if (_byValue.TryGetValue(value, out var result))
                return result;
            throw new InvalidOperationException($"No Priority with value {value} found.");
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets the Priority instance from its name.
        /// </summary>
        public static Priority FromName(string name)
        {
            if (_byName.TryGetValue(name, out var result))
                return result;
            throw new InvalidOperationException($"No Priority with name '{name}' found.");
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Tries to get the Priority instance from its value.
        /// </summary>
        public static bool TryFromValue(int value, [NotNullWhen(true)] out Priority? result)
        {
            return _byValue.TryGetValue(value, out result);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Tries to get the Priority instance from its name.
        /// </summary>
        public static bool TryFromName(string name, [NotNullWhen(true)] out Priority? result)
        {
            return _byName.TryGetValue(name, out result);
        }

    }
}

    }
